chrome_surface_reflection_hint: Working Papers · Primers · Open research questions
chrome_surface_disabled_aria: {label} (disabled — pick a probe on the Atmosphere first)
chrome_pillar_subitem_title: Active Pillar — switch via the PillarSwitch tiles at the top of the Workbench
chrome_dossier_open_title: Open the Dossier — search the catalogue & build your probe selection
chrome_library_open_title: Open your saved analyses — re-openable & shareable Workbench views
chrome_scopebar_chip_title: Where you are in the AĒR descent (Surface → Layer). See Design Brief §4.1.
chrome_pillar_question_aleph: What does the dataset look like right now?
chrome_pillar_question_episteme: How has the discourse shifted over time?
chrome_pillar_plain_aleph: A synchronic view of the active window — distributions, levels (e.g. mean sentiment), language mix, and per-source comparisons. No time axis.
chrome_pillar_plain_episteme: A diachronic view — how metrics, topics, and framings move across the window. Time is the main axis.
chrome_pillar_plain_rhizome: A relational view — who is mentioned with whom, which sources share topics, how concepts migrate.
